title: Pul-e Khumrī Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Pul-e Khumrī with a Z-Score of +3.37. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Pul-e Khumrī is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 35%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 5.6 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and daily life, with the Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
